com._1c.v8.ibis.admin

Interface IClusterManagerInfo


  • public interface IClusterManagerInfo
    Cluster manager description interface

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      UUID getClusterManagerId()
      Gets a cluster manager ID
      String getDescr()
      Gets a cluster manager description
      String getHostName()
      Gets the name or IP address of the computer where the cluster manager process should run
      int getMainManager()
      Shows whether the cluster manager is master or additional
      int getMainPort()
      Gets the main cluster manager port
      String getPid()
      Gets the operating system process ID of the cluster manager

    • Method Detail

      • getClusterManagerId

        UUID getClusterManagerId()
        Gets a cluster manager ID
        Returns:
        cluster manager ID

      • getDescr

        String getDescr()
        Gets a cluster manager description
        Returns:
        cluster manager description

      • getHostName

        String getHostName()
        Gets the name or IP address of the computer where the cluster manager process should run
        Returns:
        name or IP address of the working server

      • getMainManager

        int getMainManager()
        Shows whether the cluster manager is master or additional
        Returns:
        1 - if the manager is master, 0 - if the manager is additional

      • getMainPort

        int getMainPort()
        Gets the main cluster manager port
        Returns:
        main cluster manager port

      • getPid

        String getPid()
        Gets the operating system process ID of the cluster manager
        Returns:
        operating system process ID
